tests.name: workspaceFiles/refresh/scheduler coalesces pending refreshes and keeps the latest message
workspaceFiles/refresh/scheduler coalesces file paths and uses refreshChangedFiles when available
workspaceFiles/refresh/scheduler queues a pending refresh instead of refreshing while the graph is closed
workspaceFiles/refresh/scheduler defaults to refreshing when the provider has no graph-open probe
workspaceFiles/refresh/scheduler moves a scheduled refresh back to pending when the graph closes before the timer fires
workspaceFiles/refresh/scheduler falls back to invalidateWorkspaceFiles and refresh when changed-file refresh is unavailable
workspaceFiles/refresh/scheduler does not throw when fallback invalidation is unavailable
workspaceFiles/refresh/scheduler does not throw when the provider cannot mark a pending refresh
